label: D6 Dice Pool
description: Roll pools of d6s; count successes at a target value. Supports stress dice and panic checks.

label: D20 Check
description: Roll a single die (typically d20) and compare the total to a DC or AC.

label: Class Die Check
description: Roll one class die (d4–d20 depending on the character's class), add a flat attribute+skill modifier, and optionally roll bonus d4s (e.g. grief dice). Compare the total to a difficulty class.
